data.name: _groupLayout.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="_lblGroupCode" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_txtGroupCode" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblGroupName" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_txtGroupName" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblGroupParent" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_cmbGroupParent" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblGroupType" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_cmbGroupType" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblGroupDescription" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_txtGroupDescription" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblGroupStatus" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_chkGroupActive" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Absolute,170,Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: _accountLayout.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="_lblAccountCode" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_txtAccountCode" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblAccountName" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_txtAccountName" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblAccountParent" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_cmbAccountParent" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblAccountType" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_cmbAccountType" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblOpeningDebit" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_txtOpeningDebit" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblOpeningCredit" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_txtOpeningCredit" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblOpeningDate" Row="6" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_dtpOpeningBalanceDate" Row="6" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblAccountDescription" Row="7" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_txtAccountDescription" Row="7" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblAccountStatus" Row="8" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_chkAccountActive" Row="8" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Absolute,170,Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0,AutoSize,0" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: _summaryLayout.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="_summaryNodeTypeLabel" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_summaryNodeType" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_summaryCodeLabel" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_summaryCode" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_summaryNameLabel" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_summaryName" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblSummaryDebit" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_summaryDebit" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblSummaryCredit" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_summaryCredit" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_lblSummaryBalanceMeta" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="_summaryCompositePanel" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,20,Percent,30,Percent,20,Percent,30" /><Rows Styles="Percent,33.33,Percent,33.33,Percent,33.33" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: _subtitleLabel.Text
data.value: Select a node to view details, balance rollups, and quick actions.
